text: D=1024 fp32 OOMs because cb_q_in/k_in/v_in/cb_out (io_factor*d_t) + accumulators (d_t each) all scale with d_t; double-buffered footprint 1580KB > 1464KB budget. Fix: host-side footprint projection, single-buffer input/output CBs (io_factor 2->1) only when double-buffered OOMs.
